news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

news.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

news.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

news.title: US factory orders fall in May, weighed down by weak demand for commercial aircraft
news.description: [REUTERS] New orders for U.S. factory goods fell in May amid a decline in bookings for commercial aircraft, ​but demand elsewhere remained strong, partly driven by investment ‌in artificial intelligence.

news.title: India’s Modi Deepens Ties With Japan in ‘Uncertain Times’
news.description: [THE NEW YORK TIMES] The prime minister met with his counterpart, Sanae Takaichi of Japan, and signed agreements covering artificial intelligence, energy and security.

news.title: New Poll Connects Social Media and Chatbots With Spread of Vaccine Misinformation
news.description: [CNET] A recent survey suggests that using apps and artificial intelligence for health advice may be linked to vaccine distrust.

news.title: ICC will amplify Global South's voice in shaping global trade rules, says Harsh Pati Singhania
news.description: [CNBC TV18] The newly appointed ICC Chair says the organisation will prioritise trade certainty, bridge the global trade finance gap, back the WTO's e-commerce moratorium and work towards a harmonised global framework for artificial intelligence.

news.title: Why Flashy Generative AI Is Failing The Performance Marketing Test
news.description: [FORBES] Across industries, artificial intelligence is entering a more disciplined phase. While the early cycle rewarded novelty, the current market exclusively rewards proof.
